title: Peppery Flaky Turkish Butternut Squash Stir-fry
description: This sugar-free-friendly butternut squash dish is a savory and spicy brunch treat, perfect for those looking to spice up their morning meals.
instructions: Butternut squash, peeled and seeded, cut into cubes.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add butternut squash and red pepper flakes to the pan. Stir well to coat with spices.
Transfer contents of pan to an oven-proof dish. Drizzle with thyme leaves.
Bake in preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until tender and lightly golden, stirring halfway through baking.
Serve warm as a side or main course.
